problem: How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale?
hypothesis: Quantum tunneling through energy barrier may resolve How to achieve sustained net-positive nuclear fusion at commercial scale? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
